hooks.command: env PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 python3 -c "import pathlib,runpy,sys;p=pathlib.Path.cwd();hits=[x/'.codex'/'hooks'/'dispatch.py' for x in (p,*p.parents) if (x/'.codex'/'hooks'/'dispatch.py').exists()];d=hits[0];sys.argv=[str(d),'session_start'];runpy.run_path(str(d),run_name='__main__')"
